story.iWant: spatial questions that test my mental rotation and pattern recognition
story.soThat: the app can identify if I struggle with spatial reasoning

tasks.task: Implement SVG shape rendering with CSS transform: rotate()
Implement pattern grid rendering (3×3 flexbox with colored cells)
Add accessibility text descriptions for screen readers
Implement randomization for shape combinations and patterns
Record timing and correctness for both question types
Write unit tests achieving 100% coverage for both components

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Mental Rotation shows two 2D shapes (one rotated 90°, 180°, or 270°)
MR asks "Are these the same shape?" with Yes/No options
MR uses asymmetric shapes (L-shapes, irregular polygons) for difficulty
Pattern Matching shows 3×3 grid with pattern (checkerboard, diagonal, etc.)
PM shows 4 option grids (A, B, C, D) where one matches
PM asks "Which grid matches this pattern?"
PM records isCorrect, selectedOption, and timeToAnswer
SVG-based rendering for crisp shapes on all screen sizes
Touch targets: Minimum 60px for option buttons on mobile
Shapes randomized per session (different combinations each time)

doc.title: Architecture Spec
doc.snippet: Assessment uses features/assessment/, routes/AssessmentRoute.tsx, assessments table (Dexie), Multi-step wizard with React Hook Form

doc.title: Architecture Spec
doc.snippet: Performance targets: <100ms input latency, 60fps interactions, SVG rendering for scalable graphics

doc.title: UX Design
doc.snippet: Mobile-first with generous padding and 60px+ tap targets for option buttons. Warm, calm visual design avoiding anxiety-inducing elements. SVG-based rendering for crisp shapes.

doc.title: UX Design
doc.snippet: Primary coral #E87461 for CTAs, Success green #66BB6A for correct answers, Warning gold #FBD786 for supportive errors (not harsh red)

doc.title: Epic 2 Tech Spec
doc.snippet: SpatialRotation Q1-2: Shape rotation matching with visual shape displays. Question components record correctness, response time, user answer.

doc.title: Epic 2 Tech Spec
doc.snippet: QuestionResult interface: questionId, domain, questionType, correct, responseTime, userAnswer, expectedAnswer, difficulty

file.reason: Parent wizard shell that will render MentalRotation and PatternMatching question components
Reusable wrapper for consistent question styling - use for both spatial question types
Reference implementation for question component pattern: answer handling, timing, state management
Reference implementation for SVG rendering and interactive question UI
Add generateSpatialQuestions() alongside existing number sense generators
Export new MentalRotation and PatternMatching components from feature module
Use for Yes/No buttons (MentalRotation) and A/B/C/D option buttons (PatternMatching)
Base component used by QuestionCard wrapper
Custom render with providers for component tests

package.name: framer-motion
package.reason: Smooth animations for shape rotations and pattern transitions

package.name: lucide-react
package.reason: Icons for question UI if needed

package.name: tailwindcss
package.reason: Styling for SVG shapes, grids, and components

constraints.constraint: 100% test coverage required for all new code
Mobile-first responsive design with 60px+ tap targets (story spec)
Performance: less than 100ms input latency, 60fps interactions
Use performance.now() for accurate timing measurements
SVG shapes use <path> elements for complex shapes with CSS transform: rotate()
Pattern grids use 3×3 flexbox with colored cells
Accessibility requires text descriptions for screen readers
Warm, calm visual design to reduce anxiety - avoid harsh red error states

interface.name: QuestionResult
interface.signature: { questionId: string; domain: 'number_sense' | 'spatial' | 'operations'; questionType: string; correct: boolean; responseTime: number; userAnswer: string | number; expectedAnswer: string | number; difficulty: 1 | 2 | 3; }

interface.name: MentalRotationProps
interface.signature: { shapeType: string; rotationAngle: 90 | 180 | 270; isMatch: boolean; onAnswer: (answer: 'yes' | 'no') => void; }

interface.name: PatternMatchingProps
interface.signature: { patternType: string; correctOption: 'A' | 'B' | 'C' | 'D'; options: GridPattern[]; onAnswer: (option: string) => void; }

interface.name: SpatialQuestionConfig
interface.signature: Union type of MentalRotationConfig | PatternMatchingConfig with shape/pattern definitions

tests.standards: Testing follows architecture.md ADR-005: Vitest for unit/integration tests, React Testing Library for component tests. AAA pattern (Arrange, Act, Assert). Co-located test files (*.test.tsx). 100% coverage enforced by CI. Use custom render from tests/test-utils.tsx with all providers wrapped.

ideas.idea: Test that MentalRotation renders two SVG shapes with correct rotation angles (90°, 180°, 270°)
Test that Yes/No buttons are rendered and clickable with 60px+ touch targets
Test shape library includes asymmetric shapes (L-shapes, irregular polygons)
Test that onAnswer callback receives correct parameters including timing
Test that PatternMatching renders 3×3 grid with pattern correctly
Test that 4 option grids (A, B, C, D) are rendered with clear selection states
Test that question prompt displays correctly
Test that all required fields are recorded in answer callback (isCorrect, selectedOption, timeToAnswer)
Test SVG rendering produces crisp shapes at various viewport sizes
Test all interactive buttons meet 60px minimum touch target
Test randomization produces different shape/pattern combinations on multiple renders
